short_definitions.zh: 奖励学习信号是以如下事实为区分特征的学习信号：它由一次或一组运行的奖励值及其计算语境形成。
short_definitions.en: Reward learning signal is a learning signal; its differentiating condition is that it is formed from reward values for one or more runs together with their computation context.
short_definitions.ja: 報酬学習信号は学習信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは一回以上の実行の報酬値とその計算文脈から形成されます。

definitions.zh: 奖励学习信号是以如下事实为区分特征的学习信号：它由一次或一组运行的奖励值及其计算语境形成。
definitions.en: Reward learning signal is a learning signal; its differentiating condition is that it is formed from reward values for one or more runs together with their computation context.
definitions.ja: 報酬学習信号は学習信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは一回以上の実行の報酬値とその計算文脈から形成されます。

why_needed.zh: 奖励学习信号为canonical 事实 RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal（RewardLearningSignal is_a LearningSignal）提供明确端点并保持与 FeedbackLearningSignal 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Reward learning signal provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal (RewardLearningSignal is_a LearningSignal) while preserving its reviewed boundary from FeedbackLearningSignal.
why_needed.ja: 報酬学習信号はcanonical 事実 RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal（RewardLearningSignal is_a LearningSignal）の明確な端点を提供し、FeedbackLearningSignal との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的奖励学习信号：奖励学习信号是以如下事实为区分特征的学习信号：它由一次或一组运行的奖励值及其计算语境形成。；该种差可由关系 RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Reward learning signal records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Reward learning signal is a learning signal; its differentiating condition is that it is formed from reward values for one or more runs together with their computation context. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす報酬学習信号を含みます：報酬学習信号は学習信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは一回以上の実行の報酬値とその計算文脈から形成されます。 種差は関係 RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 反馈学习信号虽与本概念同属 LearningSignal，但其定义为“反馈学习信号是以如下事实为区分特征的学习信号：它由明确的人类或系统反馈形成，并保留反馈来源与适用语境。”，不得替代奖励学习信号。
excludes.en: FeedbackLearningSignal shares parent LearningSignal, but its reviewed definition is “Feedback learning signal is a learning signal; its differentiating condition is that it is derived from explicit human or system feedback and retains its source and applicability context.”; it must not be substituted for RewardLearningSignal.
excludes.ja: FeedbackLearningSignal は同じ上位 LearningSignal を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「フィードバック学習信号は学習信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは明示的な人間またはシステムのフィードバックから形成され、出典と適用文脈を保持します。」であり、RewardLearningSignal の代用にはできません。

differentia.zh: 端点特定对照：父节点 LearningSignal：RewardLearningSignal（semantic kind=information，骨架 RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal）；FeedbackLearningSignal（semantic kind=information，骨架 FeedbackLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal）。双端条件：RewardLearningSignal 条件：“奖励学习信号是以如下事实为区分特征的学习信号：它由一次或一组运行的奖励值及其计算语境形成”；FeedbackLearningSignal 条件：“反馈学习信号是以如下事实为区分特征的学习信号：它由明确的人类或系统反馈形成，并保留反馈来源与适用语境”。条件不得互借；各自成立后方可归类。
differentia.en: Endpoint-specific contrast: parent LearningSignal: RewardLearningSignal (semantic kind=information, backbone RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal); FeedbackLearningSignal (semantic kind=information, backbone FeedbackLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal). Endpoint conditions: RewardLearningSignal condition: “Reward learning signal is a learning signal; its differentiating condition is that it is formed from reward values for one or more runs together with their computation context”; FeedbackLearningSignal condition: “Feedback learning signal is a learning signal; its differentiating condition is that it is derived from explicit human or system feedback and retains its source and applicability context”. Conditions cannot be borrowed; classify each endpoint only from its own evidence.
differentia.ja: 端点別対照：親 LearningSignal：RewardLearningSignal（semantic kind=information、バックボーン RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal）；FeedbackLearningSignal（semantic kind=information、バックボーン FeedbackLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal）。両端条件：RewardLearningSignal の条件：「報酬学習信号は学習信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは一回以上の実行の報酬値とその計算文脈から形成されます」；FeedbackLearningSignal の条件：「フィードバック学習信号は学習信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは明示的な人間またはシステムのフィードバックから形成され、出典と適用文脈を保持します」。条件を流用せず、各端を固有の証拠で分類します。

labels.en: Positive example of Reward learning signal

descriptions.zh: 在一次评估、纠正与改进决策循环中，系统将奖励学习信号（RewardLearningSignal）记录为 RewardLearningSignal is_a LearningSignal 的源端点。其已审查定义是“奖励学习信号是以如下事实为区分特征的学习信号：它由一次或一组运行的奖励值及其计算语境形成”。
descriptions.en: During an evaluation and correction cycle for improvement decisions, the system records Reward learning signal (RewardLearningSignal) as the source of RewardLearningSignal is_a LearningSignal. Its reviewed definition is “Reward learning signal is a learning signal; its differentiating condition is that it is formed from reward values for one or more runs together with their computation context”.
descriptions.ja: 評価・修正・改善判断のサイクルでは、システムは報酬学習信号（RewardLearningSignal）を RewardLearningSignal is_a LearningSignal の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「報酬学習信号は学習信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは一回以上の実行の報酬値とその計算文脈から形成されます」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 RewardLearningSignal 以及方向保持不变的事实 RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal。
expected_result.en: The run can query RewardLearningSignal together with direction-preserving fact RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal.
expected_result.ja: この実行では RewardLearningSignal と方向を保持した事実 RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal を共に照会できます。

descriptions.zh: FeedbackLearningSignal 用作RewardLearningSignal的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 FeedbackLearningSignal 的已审查定义是“反馈学习信号是以如下事实为区分特征的学习信号：它由明确的人类或系统反馈形成，并保留反馈来源与适用语境。”。不能因 shared parent LearningSignal 而把它归入RewardLearningSignal。
descriptions.en: FeedbackLearningSignal is the boundary contrast for RewardLearningSignal. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but FeedbackLearningSignal's reviewed definition is “Feedback learning signal is a learning signal; its differentiating condition is that it is derived from explicit human or system feedback and retains its source and applicability context.”. shared parent LearningSignal does not make it a RewardLearningSignal.

expected_result.ja: FeedbackLearningSignal は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで RewardLearningSignal へ昇格してはなりません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 RewardLearningSignal（奖励学习信号）由 feedback-optimization-learning 拥有，用于“当对象跨越多个运行或评审，把证据汇总为优化目标、学习信号或待治理变更提案时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms RewardLearningSignal (Reward learning signal) is owned by feedback-optimization-learning for the use case “Own an object when it spans multiple runs or reviews and aggregates evidence into an optimization target, learning signal, or governed change proposal.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は RewardLearningSignal（報酬学習信号）を feedback-optimization-learning が「対象が複数の実行またはレビューにまたがり、証拠を最適化目標、学習信号、統制対象の変更提案へ集約する場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 RewardLearningSignal 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。

decision_note.ja: 本体審査は RewardLearningSignal の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=RewardLearningSignal-is_a-LearningSignal、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

definitions.zh: 任何变更提案在影响运行配置前都需要一项可审计的策略决策。

authority_basis.zh: 变更提案仍由 feedback-optimization-learning 唯一拥有，策略决策仍由 safety-permission-policy 唯一拥有；requires 只建立跨域事实，不转移定义权。若该事实触发运行操作，还必须引用适用的 PolicyDecision 或 AuthorizationGrant。
authority_basis.en: Change proposal remains uniquely owned by feedback-optimization-learning and policy decision by safety-permission-policy; requires establishes a cross-Domain fact without transferring definitional ownership. If the fact triggers a runtime operation, it must also reference an applicable PolicyDecision or AuthorizationGrant.
authority_basis.ja: 変更提案は feedback-optimization-learning、ポリシー判断は safety-permission-policy に引き続き一意に所有されます。requires は定義所有権を移さずドメイン横断事実だけを確立し、実行操作を起動する場合は適用される PolicyDecision または AuthorizationGrant も参照します。

protocol_or_resource_context.en: Queries follow the source-to-target direction, endpoint canonical IDs, and source claims of ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision; protocol versions, resource identity, and trust decisions remain attached to the original nodes or relation.
protocol_or_resource_context.ja: 照会は ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision の source→target 方向、端点 canonical ID、当該関係の出典主張に従い、プロトコル版、資源同一性、信頼判断は元のノードまたは関係に保持されます。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision（requires）由 feedback-optimization-learning 拥有，用于“当对象跨越多个运行或评审，把证据汇总为优化目标、学习信号或待治理变更提案时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision (requires) is owned by feedback-optimization-learning for the use case “Own an object when it spans multiple runs or reviews and aggregates evidence into an optimization target, learning signal, or governed change proposal.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision（requires）を feedback-optimization-learning が「対象が複数の実行またはレビューにまたがり、証拠を最適化目標、学習信号、統制対象の変更提案へ集約する場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision 的 predicate 为 requires，方向为 ChangeProposal → PolicyDecision，relation kind 为 governance，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 ChangeProposal→PolicyDecision、predicate=requires、relation kind=governance、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision has predicate requires, direction ChangeProposal → PolicyDecision, relation kind governance, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction ChangeProposal->PolicyDecision, predicate=requires, relation kind=governance, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision の predicate が requires、方向が ChangeProposal → PolicyDecision、relation kind が governance、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 ChangeProposal→PolicyDecision、predicate=requires、relation kind=governance、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ChangeProposal-requires-PolicyDecision の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

authority_basis.zh: LearningSignal 仍由 feedback-plane 拥有，MemoryRecord 仍由 memory-plane 拥有；该 causal 事实只建立跨域依赖，不转移规范所有权。运行时授权必须由具体 PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant 或协议会话证明。
authority_basis.en: LearningSignal remains owned by feedback-plane and MemoryRecord by memory-plane; this causal fact establishes a cross-Domain dependency without transferring canonical ownership. Runtime authority must be evidenced by a concrete PolicyDecision, AuthorizationGrant, or protocol session.
authority_basis.ja: LearningSignal は feedback-plane、MemoryRecord は memory-plane に引き続き所有されます。この causal 事実は正規所有権を移さずドメイン横断依存だけを表し、実行時権限には具体的な PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant、またはプロトコルセッションの証拠が必要です。

protocol_or_resource_context.en: Queries follow the canonical LearningSignal → MemoryRecord assertion and this relation's own source claims; protocol version, resource identity, and trust decisions remain in the endpoint information contracts.
protocol_or_resource_context.ja: 問い合わせは LearningSignal → MemoryRecord の canonical ID と当該関係固有の出典主張に従います。プロトコル版、資源識別、信頼判断は両端ノードの情報契約に保持されます。

descriptions.zh: LearningSignal 与 ToolSelectionDecision 同时出现但没有可验证的“learning signal updates tool selection”断言；仅共现不能建立该关系。 审查定义：该关系说明学习信号更新工具选择决策或未来选择准则。
descriptions.en: LearningSignal and ToolSelectionDecision co-occur without a verifiable learning signal updates tool selection assertion; co-occurrence alone does not establish this relation. Reviewed definition: records that a LearningSignal updates a ToolSelectionDecision or its future selection criteria, fallback behavior, or ranking policy.
descriptions.ja: LearningSignal と ToolSelectionDecision は同時に現れますが、検証可能な「learning signal updates tool selection」アサーションがなく、共起だけではこの関係を成立させません。 審査済み定義：この関係は、学習信号がツール選択判断または将来の選択基準を更新することを示します。

expected_result.zh: 验证器不得把该对象归类为learning signal updates tool selection。
expected_result.en: Validation must not classify the object as learning signal updates tool selection.
expected_result.ja: 検証器はこの対象をlearning signal updates tool selectionとして分類してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 関連性または共通の上位概念だけでは、厳密な概念所属を証明できません。

deprecation_reason.zh: 学习信号只能支持变更提案；运行中的记忆、路由或工具选择必须经过显式提案、策略决策和后续执行，不能由信号直接修改。
deprecation_reason.en: A learning signal may only support a change proposal; memory, routing, or tool selection in operation must pass through an explicit proposal, policy decision, and subsequent execution rather than direct signal mutation.
deprecation_reason.ja: 学習信号は変更提案を支援するだけであり、運用中の記憶、経路制御、ツール選択は明示的な提案、ポリシー判断、その後の実行を経なければ直接変更できません。

change_note.zh: v3 依据显式关系决策确认 canonical 方向与默认逻辑骨架职责。
change_note.en: v3 confirmed canonical direction and default logical-backbone responsibility from explicit relation decisions.
change_note.ja: v3 は明示的な関係判断に基づき canonical 方向と既定論理バックボーン責務を確認しました。

definitions.zh: 学习信号 是一种 反馈。区分特征：LearningSignal 是被解释为未来改进建议的一种 Feedback，只能产生变更提案。
definitions.en: learning signal is a kind of feedback. Reviewed differentia: A LearningSignal is Feedback interpreted for future improvement and can only produce a change proposal.
definitions.ja: 学習信号 は フィードバック の一種です。審査済みの種差：LearningSignal は将来改善向けに解釈された Feedback の一種で、変更提案だけを生成できる。

cardinality_not_applicable_reason.ja: 分類継承にはインスタンス関係の基数を用いません。

descriptions.en: In synthetic run LearningSignal-is_a-Feedback-scenario-001, LearningSignal explicitly is a Feedback; the assertion preserves its source-to-target direction, predicate, and qualifiers. Reviewed definition: learning signal is a kind of feedback. Reviewed differentia: A LearningSignal is Feedback interpreted for future improvement and can only produce a change proposal.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 LearningSignal-supports-ChangeProposal（supports）由 feedback-optimization-learning 拥有，用于“当对象跨越多个运行或评审，把证据汇总为优化目标、学习信号或待治理变更提案时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms LearningSignal-supports-ChangeProposal (supports) is owned by feedback-optimization-learning for the use case “Own an object when it spans multiple runs or reviews and aggregates evidence into an optimization target, learning signal, or governed change proposal.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は LearningSignal-supports-ChangeProposal（supports）を feedback-optimization-learning が「対象が複数の実行またはレビューにまたがり、証拠を最適化目標、学習信号、統制対象の変更提案へ集約する場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 LearningSignal-supports-ChangeProposal 的 predicate 为 supports，方向为 LearningSignal → ChangeProposal，relation kind 为 information，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 LearningSignal→ChangeProposal、predicate=supports、relation kind=information、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation LearningSignal-supports-ChangeProposal has predicate supports, direction LearningSignal → ChangeProposal, relation kind information, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction LearningSignal->ChangeProposal, predicate=supports, relation kind=information, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 LearningSignal-supports-ChangeProposal の predicate が supports、方向が LearningSignal → ChangeProposal、relation kind が information、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 LearningSignal→ChangeProposal、predicate=supports、relation kind=information、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: LearningSignal-supports-ChangeProposal 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for LearningSignal-supports-ChangeProposal were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: LearningSignal-supports-ChangeProposal の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 optimization_loop_consumes_feedback（optimization loop consumes feedback）由 feedback-optimization-learning 拥有，用于“当对象跨越多个运行或评审，把证据汇总为优化目标、学习信号或待治理变更提案时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms optimization_loop_consumes_feedback (optimization loop consumes feedback) is owned by feedback-optimization-learning for the use case “Own an object when it spans multiple runs or reviews and aggregates evidence into an optimization target, learning signal, or governed change proposal.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 optimization_loop_consumes_feedback 的 predicate 为 optimization_loop_consumes_feedback，方向为 OptimizationLoop → Feedback，relation kind 为 causal，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 OptimizationLoop→Feedback、predicate=optimization_loop_consumes_feedback、relation kind=causal、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。

decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 optimization_loop_consumes_feedback の predicate が optimization_loop_consumes_feedback、方向が OptimizationLoop → Feedback、relation kind が causal、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 OptimizationLoop→Feedback、predicate=optimization_loop_consumes_feedback、relation kind=causal、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。
